features: VERSATILE USE – Whether as gift bags, Easter bags or paper bags for DIY projects: these paper carrier bags with handles are ideal for weddings, parties, birthdays and many other occasions.
SUSTAINABLE PACKAGING – 100% recyclable and biodegradable. The paper bags are made of robust kraft paper and are the perfect alternative to plastic bags.
PRACTICAL FORMAT – Pack of 50. With a size of 22 x 10 x 28 cm, the bags are compact but spacious – reusable and space-saving.
STABLE AND RELIABLE – Thanks to the twisted paper cord handle, the gift bags are particularly stable and comfortable to carry – ideal for environmentally conscious shopping and packaging.
STYLISH DESIGNS – Whether for Christmas, DIY advent calendar or as gift wrapping: the simple white or brown paper bags can be individually painted, glued or labelled.
description: Product Description Versatile paper bags in white and brown Ideal for personalisation and branding These paper bags are the perfect foundation to showcase your brand or create a unique design. Its smooth surface in white or brown is ideal for printing logos, slogans or designs, so you can design your bags according to your wishes. High-quality and economical kraft paper bags Paper bags are made of durable, high-quality kraft paper, which makes our products reusable, odourless, safe and practical for your use. Our gift bags are not only aesthetically pleasing, but also economical as they can be reused many times. Available in various sizes Our paper bags come in different sizes to suit all your needs, be it for small or larger items. Each order includes a package of 250 bags, so you always have enough on hand, whether for business or personal use. Our paper bags give you the flexibility and convenience you need. Robust, aesthetic and practical Perfect for gifts, events and shops Our paper bags, available in white and brown, are ideal for shops, gift wrapping and special occasions such as weddings, birthdays or trade shows. Its simple and elegant design is suitable for any occasion.
